name: tendrel
description: A research graph + LLM wiki for Claude Code. Typed nodes (experiments, theories, decisions) with evidence lifecycles and dependency edges, kept as markdown in your repo. In-session setup via /tendrel:seed; SessionStart anomaly report; on-demand reconcile; /tendrel:reconcile, /tendrel:status, /tendrel:seed commands; configurable verbosity and opt-in background execution for status and seed; graph visualization in status.md.
